title: Otamendi Training Tackle on Messi Sparks Panic Before Argentina Match
description: Recent reports indicate a training incident involving Otamendi and Messi has caused concern ahead of a major match for Argentina.

sections.heading: Training Incident
paragraphs: According to MARCA, Otamendi made a training tackle on Messi that sparked panic before Argentina's biggest match.

sections.heading: World Cup Final Context
paragraphs: Yardbarker reports on the lineup for the World Cup Final between Argentina and Spain, specifically questioning why Leandro Paredes is not playing today.
MSN has also published coverage regarding who is injured for the World Cup final.

paragraphs: The keyword 'otamendi' has a reported search lower bound of 1000 in the CA region. This data was included in a trend feed published on July 19, 2026.
